{{Infobox technique
| name = Lirial Gate
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Lirial Gate]] can be opened by [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lirial]] [[Gates]] shift their location based on the moons.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lirial]] is identified by the open [[Lirial Gate]] next to her.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
